metadata.title: Terms of Service
metadata.description: Terms of Service for CoOrder restaurant management platform. Learn about your rights and responsibilities when using our service.

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing and using the CoOrder restaurant management service ("Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to any part of these terms, you may not use our Service.

description.title: 2. Description of Service
description.content: CoOrder provides a comprehensive restaurant management platform including menu management, order processing, booking system, staff management tools, and analytics. The Service is designed to help restaurants streamline their operations and improve customer experience.

registration.title: 3. Account Registration
registration.content: To use the Service, you must create an account. You agree to provide accurate, current, and complete information during registration and to update such information to keep it accurate. You are responsible for safeguarding your account password and for all activities under your account.

plans.free: **Free Plan**: Basic functionality with limited features
plans.basic: **Basic Plan**: Full access to core features with monthly pricing
plans.premium: **Premium Plan**: All features plus advanced analytics and priority support

billing.title: Billing
billing.content: Paid plans are billed monthly or annually in advance. All fees are non-refundable except as required by law. Pricing may change with 30 days notice.

cancellation.title: Cancellation
cancellation.content: You may cancel your subscription at any time. Cancellation will be effective at the end of the current billing cycle.

usage.title: 5. Acceptable Use
usage.content: You agree to use the Service only for lawful purposes and in a way that does not infringe the rights of any third party. You must not:

restrictions.0: Use the Service for any illegal activities
restrictions.1: Upload or distribute viruses or other malicious code
restrictions.2: Attempt unauthorized access to our systems
restrictions.3: Interfere with the normal operation of the Service
restrictions.4: Violate any applicable laws or regulations

intellectual.title: 6. Intellectual Property
intellectual.content: The Service and its original content, features and functionality are and will remain the exclusive property of CoOrder and its licensors. The Service is protected by copyright, trademark, and other laws. You may not copy, modify, distribute, sell, or lease any part of our Service.

privacy.title: 7. Privacy and Data
privacy.content: Your privacy is important to us. Our collection and use of your information is governed by our Privacy Policy. By using the Service, you consent to the collection and use of information in accordance with our Privacy Policy.

termination.title: 8. Termination
termination.content: We may terminate or suspend your account immediately, without prior notice or liability, for any reason whatsoever, including without limitation if you breach the Terms of Service. Upon termination, your right to use the Service will cease immediately.

liability.title: 9. Disclaimer of Warranties
liability.content: The Service is provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis. CoOrder disclaims all warranties, whether express or implied, including but not limited to implied warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, and non-infringement. In no event shall CoOrder be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages.

governing.title: 10. Governing Law
governing.content: These Terms shall be interpreted and governed by the laws of [Your Jurisdiction], without regard to its conflict of law provisions. Our failure to enforce any right or provision of these Terms will not be considered a waiver of those rights.

changes.title: 11. Changes to Terms
changes.content: We reserve the right to modify or replace these Terms at any time. If a revision is material, we will provide at least 30 days notice prior to any new terms taking effect. What constitutes a material change will be determined at our sole discretion.

contact.title: 12. Contact Information
contact.content: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at:

metadata.title: Privacy Policy
metadata.description: Learn how CoOrder collects, uses, and protects your personal information in our restaurant management service.

overview.title: 1. Overview
overview.content: CoOrder ("we", "our", or "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our CoOrder restaurant management service ("Service").

collection.title: 2. Information We Collect
collection.subtitle: We collect information you provide directly to us:

direct.account: **Account Information**: Name, email address, password, and contact details
direct.restaurant: **Restaurant Information**: Restaurant name, address, phone number, and business details
direct.payment: **Payment Information**: Billing details and payment information (processed securely)
direct.content: **Content**: Menu information, dish descriptions, images, and other restaurant data

automatic.title: We also collect information automatically:
automatic.usage: **Usage Data**: How you interact with our Service
automatic.device: **Device Information**: IP address, browser type, operating system
automatic.location: **Location Data**: General location information based on IP address
automatic.cookies: **Cookies and Tracking Data**: As described in the Cookies section below

usage.title: 3. How We Use Information
usage.content: We use the information we collect to:

purposes.0: Provide, maintain, and improve our Service
purposes.1: Process transactions and send related notices
purposes.2: Send technical notices, updates, and security alerts
purposes.3: Provide customer support and respond to your requests
purposes.4: Analyze usage to improve our Service

sharing.title: 4. Information Sharing
sharing.content: We do not sell your personal information. We may share your information in the following circumstances:

circumstances.0: **Service Providers**: With trusted contractors who provide services on our behalf
circumstances.1: **Legal Requirements**: When required by law or to protect our rights
circumstances.2: **Business Transactions**: In the event of a merger, acquisition, or asset sale
circumstances.3: **Consent**: With your explicit consent for specific purposes

security.title: 5. Data Security
security.content: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. These measures include:

measures.0: Encryption of data in transit and at rest
measures.1: Regular access controls and system monitoring

retention.title: 6. Data Retention
retention.content: We retain your personal information only for as long as necessary to provide the Service and comply with legal obligations. When information is no longer needed, we will securely delete or anonymize it.

rights.title: 7. Your Rights
rights.content: Depending on your location, you may have the following rights regarding your personal information:

list.0: **Access**: Request a copy of the personal information we hold about you
list.1: **Rectification**: Request that we correct inaccurate information
list.2: **Erasure**: Request that we delete your personal information
list.3: **Restriction**: Request that we restrict processing of your information
list.4: **Portability**: Request transfer of your data to another organization
list.5: **Objection**: Object to our processing of your personal information

rights.exercise: To exercise these rights, please contact us using the contact information provided below.

cookies.title: 8. Cookies and Tracking Technologies
cookies.content: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to collect and use personal information about you. Cookies are small files stored on your device. You can control cookies through your browser settings.

international.title: 9. International Transfers
international.content: Your information may be transferred to and maintained on computers located outside of your state, province, country, or other governmental jurisdiction where data protection laws may differ from those in your jurisdiction.

children.title: 10. Children's Privacy
children.content: Our Service is not intended for children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personally identifiable information from children under 13.

changes.title: 11. Changes to this Policy
changes.content: We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page and updating the "last updated" date.

contact.title: 12. Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:
